title: Monday Docs Checklist not updating with board item
excerpt:
in the Monday docs, if I create a checklist and use it to create items to a Monday board, even if I change that item in the board (specifically: the name) it doesn’t update on the monday doc checklist. 
Am I doing someth…

posts.author: khays (Kia Hays)
posts.cookedHtml:
in the Monday docs, if I create a checklist and use it to create items to a Monday board, even if I change that item in the board (specifically: the name) it doesn’t update on the monday doc checklist.

Am I doing something wrong, or is this not a feature?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @khays!

From my understanding it’s expected that changes made to the text in the workdoc wouldn’t translate to the item in the board. That said, I have followed up with our developers on this and will update you once I hear back

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Just following up here! I have had confirmation that at this time changes to text in the workdoc will not sync to the item, and vice versa. Thanks for sharing this as a feature suggestion however, this is the best way to increase visibility and increase votes to get this feature request considered
